summary: Tested Admin Console Ad Queue functionality. Fixed critical frontend bug where Approval Queue was not displaying pending ads due to incorrect data property access (queue.queue vs queue.pending). All 9 backend tests pass. Frontend UI now correctly shows pending ads with Approve/Reject buttons.
seed_data_creation: Used existing TEST_ prefixed ads from previous testing iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ad Approval Queue fully working after fix. Admin Console > Ads tab has 3 sub-tabs: Overview (shows Ad Performance, Ad Frequency, Approval Queue Summary), Approval Queue (shows pending ads with Approve/Reject/Edit buttons), All Variants (shows all ad variants with status badges). Queue badge shows pending count. Fixed bug: frontend was accessing queue.queue but API returns queue.pending.

POST /api/admin/ads/queue/{ad_id}/action.description: Rejects ad, sets is_active=false, approval_status='rejected', refunds credits

GET /api/admin/ads/config.description: Returns ad configuration with frequency and variants

GET /api/ads/my-submissions.description: Returns user's submitted ads with counts by status

Admin Console Ads Tab UI.description: Shows Overview, Approval Queue, All Variants sub-tabs

Approve/Reject Buttons.description: Visible and functional in Approval Queue after fix

approval_queue_not_displaying_ads.issue: Frontend was accessing queue?.queue but API returns pending ads in queue?.pending
approval_queue_not_displaying_ads.fix: Changed queue?.queue to queue?.pending in the Approval Queue rendering logic
